goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'entertainment' and should be in the 'centre'.
If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in 'the type of nightclub'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 10:30' and should leave on 'thursday'.
The train should go to 'cambridge' and should depart from 'norwich'.
Make sure you get 'train ID' and 'departure time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of entertainment and should be in the centre
If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in the type of nightclub
Make sure you get entrance fee
You are also looking for a train. The train should arrive by 10:30 and should leave on thursday
The train should go to cambridge and should depart from norwich
Make sure you get train ID and departure time
